results.name: cycle-cmr-backward-partner
results.description: The backwards half of the draft signpost partner legends in CMR. See also [cycle-cmr-forward-partner](cycle-cmr-forward-partner).

results.name: cycle-cmr-forward-partner
results.description: The forward half of the draft signpost partner legends in CMR. See also [cycle-cmr-backward-partner](cycle-cmr-backward-partner).

results.name: cycle-colorless-land
results.description: Cycles of lands that produce only colorless mana.

results.name: cycle-con-forward-synergy
results.description: Way looser than the backward cycle, I'd say these don't qualify given that there isn't even a green->white card.

results.name: cycle-cycling-land
results.description: Cycles of cycling lands. (Alternate title: we saw you like cycles, so we put cycling in your cycles so you can cycle while you cycle.)
